title: Kindling
content:
As a matter of fact,
        ovens do carry a glazed stare,
        fireplaces are wont to parry
        thoughts to kindling
        before their stoop and
        on breathless summer nights
        one is hard pressed
        to recall cinder and
        blackened barleys any more
        vegetatively than upon
        these harridan pots.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Kindling"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
